programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with several independent researchers about the efforts of international bankers to control the course of history and enslave humanity through their monopoly of the creation of money and the manipulation of the money supply.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Bilderbergs
programme.desc: A glimpse backstage at the highly secretive annual gathering of the world's richest and most powerful movers and shakers.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: A serious investigation of the long-held theory that Elvis Presley faked his death in August 1977. Jokes of Elvis sightings in Kalamazoo aside, there is a considerable volume of evidence to suggest Elvis may not have left the building

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Ouija Boards?
programme.desc: Harmless board game or portal to the spirit world? Richard delves into the history and folklore of 'talking boards' with a collector of Ouija boards and a world renowned paranormal investigator.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: An investigation into the practice of past-life regression therapy; a technique where subjects are placed under hypnosis in order to recover memories of supposed past lives.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Depopulation Agenda
programme.desc: Richard interviews an investigative health reporter and a NY Times best-selling author about their claims that a powerful cabal is waging war on mankind through forced sterilization, vaccination and other means.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Shroud of Turin
programme.desc: Is this famous piece of linen cloth the actual burial cloth of Jesus Christ or a clever Medieval hoax?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Remote Viewing
programme.desc: We meet several individuals who claim they have the ability to transcend time and space and identify people, objects, and locations hidden from their view.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Were the Mercury, Genesis, Apollo and Space Shuttle programs mere window dressing designed for public consumption?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Alien Abductions
programme.desc: Richard speaks with two alleged alien abductees about their claims they were taken aboard an alien space craft.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: End times prophecy experts discuss the possible identity of the antichrist and the timing of his emergence onto the world state.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Are we really running out of oil, or does the government and Big Oil just want us to think we are? Two proponents of the abiotic oil theory argue that oil is not a fossil fuel and actually replenishes itself deep within the earth.
programme.sub-title: Are We Running Out of Oil?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets members of the 9/11 Truth movement who challenge the official version of events concerning the attack on the U.S. Pentagon. Researchers present evidence to suggest the attack was perpetrated by some rogue element inside the U.S. government.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Two victims of alleged electronic harassment and organized gang-stalking recount their horrible ordeals. Richard investigates possible theories as to who is behind this program and why.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: An investigation into the various conspiracy theories revolving around the tragic death of Diana, The People's Princess, in Paris in August 1997.
programme.sub-title: The Death of Princess Diana - Tragic Car Accident or Murder Most Foul?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Area 51
programme.desc: What's going on inside Area 51, America's most carefully guarded secret? The mysterious military base located 30 minutes north west of Las Vegas has been rumored to be involved in back engineering advanced alien technology recovered from UFO crash sites.

programme.title: A Prison on Earth
programme.desc: In the shadows of other dimensions, there lies a nefarious force waging war upon humans for millennia from the space between spaces - a dark force that governs not just our thoughts and actions but our very souls.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Is The Cure for Cancer Being Suppressed?
programme.desc: Richard investigates claims that the medical profession, drug companies, the food industry and government agencies are suppressing a cure for cancer.
programme.sub-title: Is The Cure for Cancer Being Suppressed?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Phoenix Lights
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1997, an extraordinary event occurred across the state of Arizona that has become the subject of great debate in the UFO community.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard interviews the expedition organizer who is planning on leading a team of scientists, filmmakers and tourists to the Arctic aboard a Russian nuclear ice-breaker in search of an entrance into the interior of our world.
programme.sub-title: Journey to the Center of the Earth

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: A lawyer and from the Pacific Northwest claims to have been part of a secret government time travel experiment, known as Project Pegasus.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Did Jim Morrison Fake His Death?
programme.desc: Is it conceivable that the Doors legendary front man did not die in a bathtub in Paris of an apparent drug overdose?
programme.sub-title: Did Jim Morrison Fake His Death?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Rise of the Fourth Reich (Nazi's in America)
programme.desc: The Allies defeated the Axis Powers on the battlefield, but did they actually win the war? Richard interviews several alternative historians who say that while the German Army may have surrendered in 1945, the Nazi's never officially did.
programme.sub-title: The Rise of the Fourth Reich (Nazi's in America)

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Execution of MLK and The Framing of James Earl Ray
programme.desc: In this re-examination of the assassination of civil rights leader Martin Luther King, Richard meets several researchers who provide evidence that the convicted gunman, James Earl Ray was not the real triggerman.
programme.sub-title: The Execution of MLK and The Framing of James Earl Ray

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard examines the growing UFO Disclosure movement and its attempts to force the US Government to reveal to the public what it knows about UFOs and aliens.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: GMO - Genetically Modified Food
programme.desc: Richard investigates claims crop plants created for human or animal consumption using the latest molecular biology techniques are unsafe.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the pre-eminent investigators of the alleged crash of a UFO near Roswell, New Mexico in 1947.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Could vampires be real? A well-known U.S. paranormal investigator and folklorist in New York City recounts the legend and evolution of the vampire throughout history and from culture to culture.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: JFK
programme.desc: Richard meets with some prominent JFK assassination researchers to discuss the November 1963 murder of President John F. Kennedy.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Water Engine
programme.desc: Did the late Stanley Meyer figure out a way to run an internal combustion engine on pure water? And was he murdered because of the threat his invention posed to Big Oil?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: The legend of the werewolf throughout history and in various cultures is explored. The Conspiracy Show travels to England and rural Wisconsin to investigate claims of actual werewolf sightings.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: The Philadelphia Experiment
programme.desc: Richard investigates a legendary naval military experiment said to have been carried out at the Philadelphia Naval Shipyard in October 1943.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Agenda 21
programme.desc: Is Agenda 21 simply a non-binding, voluntarily implemented action plan of the United Nations with regard to sustainable development?

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett: Fluoride
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show investigates the safety and efficacy of putting fluoride in our water supply. Dentists say that putting fluoride in the water supply prevents tooth decay, but some researchers claim it's a toxic substance that causes cancer.

programme.title: The Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard meets the owners of an abnormal humanoid skull allegedly discovered in Mexico in the 1930s and a researcher who has had the skull subjected to numerous tests including carbon-14 dating, and DNA in order to determine it’s origin.

programme.title: Butterfly Effect: Deepwater: An Ocean of Oil
programme.desc: On April 20 2010 an explosion on the Deepwater Horizon oilrig triggers the greatest oil spill in History.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Egyptian Museum
programme.desc: From the mystery of a Pharaoh’s gold to the strange practice of animal mummification, discover the secrets inside the Egyptian Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Smithsonian Institution, Washington DC
programme.desc: From the Zeros that bombed Pearl Harbor to the rocket that could take humans to Mars, discover the secrets inside the Smithsonian Institution.
programme.sub-title: Inside the Smithsonian Institution, Washington DC

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Maritime Museum, London
programme.desc: From the musket shot that killed Admiral Nelson to an anti-piracy commando raid, discover the secrets inside the National Maritime Museum.
programme.sub-title: Inside the National Maritime Museum, London

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul
programme.desc: From assassins who plot to poison a Sultan to bitter enemies who sign the world’s first peace treaty, discover the secrets inside the Topkapi Palace Museum.
programme.sub-title: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Museum of Anthropology, Mexico City
programme.desc: From ancient athletes who kick a severed head to a peasant dress that brings down an empire, discover the secrets inside the National Museum of Anthropology.
programme.sub-title: Inside the National Museum of Anthropology, Mexico City

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Imperial War Museum, London
programme.desc: From Churchill risking his life in the Blitz to 21st Century soldiers who become invisible, discover the secrets inside the Imperial War Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum, Vienna
programme.desc: From the alchemy of turning silver into gold to a dance craze that changed history, discover the secrets inside the Kunsthistorisches Museum.

programme.title: M.A.D. World: Revolution
programme.desc: Mid-1950s: Military bases line the Iron Curtain. Soviet tanks crush Hungarian revolution. Cuba sees Communist dictatorship. Sputnik launches Space Race. Berlin Wall divides West Berlin.

programme.title: M.A.D. World: Nuclear poker
programme.desc: 1962: USSR places nukes in Cuba, nearly sparking war. US troops land in Vietnam. Prague Spring fails in '68. Moon landing in '69. Nixon visits China in '72.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Hostage-Takers
programme.desc: For the police, hostage crises are the worst things that can happen. Under pressure from the public and the media, investigators must make snap decisions that mean the difference between life and death.

programme.title: Greatest Crimes of All Time: Gang Bosses
programme.desc: They rule the underworld: gang bosses. They make millions with racketeering and drug trafficking. For investigators, it is more than a fight against criminality – it is a veritable war.

programme.title: Murder Maps: Finding Dr Crippen
programme.desc: Having killed his wife and buried her in the basement, Dr Crippen believed he had escaped on a ship to Canada. But the police managed to hunt him down and bring him to account for his terrible crime.

programme.title: Murder Maps: The Brides In The Bath Killer
programme.desc: George Smith had many aliases. He needed them for his many wives who he would soon murder in order to claim the inheritance. Catching this chameleon would be a gargantuan challenge.
programme.sub-title: The Brides In The Bath Killer

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Egyptian Museum
programme.desc: From the mystery of a Pharaoh’s gold to the strange practice of animal mummification, discover the secrets inside the Egyptian Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Smithsonian Institution, Washington DC
programme.desc: From the Zeros that bombed Pearl Harbor to the rocket that could take humans to Mars, discover the secrets inside the Smithsonian Institution.
programme.sub-title: Inside the Smithsonian Institution, Washington DC

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Maritime Museum, London
programme.desc: From the musket shot that killed Admiral Nelson to an anti-piracy commando raid, discover the secrets inside the National Maritime Museum.
programme.sub-title: Inside the National Maritime Museum, London

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul
programme.desc: From assassins who plot to poison a Sultan to bitter enemies who sign the world’s first peace treaty, discover the secrets inside the Topkapi Palace Museum.
programme.sub-title: Inside the Topkapi Palace Museum, Istanbul

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the National Museum of Anthropology, Mexico City
programme.desc: From ancient athletes who kick a severed head to a peasant dress that brings down an empire, discover the secrets inside the National Museum of Anthropology.
programme.sub-title: Inside the National Museum of Anthropology, Mexico City

programme.title: Michael Jackson History-The King Of Pop 1958-2009
programme.desc: A retrospective of the life of the King of Pop by DJ Paul Gambaccini. Features an insight into his relationships with Elizabeth Taylor and Lisa Marie Presley and his untimely death.

programme.title: Final 24
programme.desc: Featuring archival footage, dramatic reenactments, and interviews with his family and closest companions, Final 24 documents the final moments of this rock star’s life.

programme.title: The Big Interview: Phil Collins
programme.desc: Legendary singer-songwriter, Phil Collins, sits down with Dan Rather to talk about his anticipated return to the music scene, his record breaking success and a possible future partnership with singer, Adele.

programme.title: Murder Rap: Inside the Biggie and Tupac Murders
programme.desc: Two of the most notorious unsolved cases in the history of American crime – the murders of rap stars Tupac Shakur and Biggie Smalls – have been the subject of exhaustive investigations, relentless speculation, and a web of conspiracy theories.

programme.title: Dr. Dre: Another Beat
programme.desc: Music producer, Apple executive and N.W.A. rapper recently announced that he would be releasing his first album since 1999, featuring guests such as Eminem, Kendrick Lamar, Ice Cube, Snoop Dogg amongst many others.

programme.title: The Big Interview: The Doobie Brothers
programme.desc: Still rockin’ down the highway after all these years, The Doobie Brothers take time for a backstage conversation about their incredible run.

programme.title: The Big Interview: The Doors
programme.desc: The two surviving members of The Doors, John Densmore and Robby Krieger, reminisce about their music, the sixties, and the life and death of Jim Morrison.

programme.title: Amy Winehouse & Me: Dionne's Story
programme.desc: Ten years after Amy Winehouse's tragic death, this documentary sees her goddaughter, Dionne Bromfield open up for the first time about the impact of Amy's death on her life.

programme.title: The Beatles: A Long and Winding Road
programme.desc: Follow the early Beatles as they work the club scene in Hamburg en route to their ultimate eternalized fame and influence.

programme.title: Pop Profiles: Daft Punk
programme.desc: This episode is dedicated to one of the most iconic pop stars of our time: Daft Punk. Daft Punk's story is told chronologically through their major hit singles. New interviews add insight into the life of Daft Punk.

programme.title: Pop Profiles: Whitney Houston
programme.desc: This episode is dedicated to one of the most iconic pop stars of our time: Whitney Houston. Whitney's story is told chronologically through her major hit singles. New interviews add insight into the life of Whitney Houston.

programme.title: The Big Interview: Daryl Hall
programme.desc: Hall of Fame singer Daryl Hall talks about his music career and his passion for restoring old homes.

programme.title: The Beatles: A Long and Winding Road: There Are Places I Remember (1940-1958)
programme.desc: An intimate retelling of the goings-on surrounding the four Beatles' upbringings and early pre-Beatles years.

programme.title: Video Killed the Radio Star: Billy Idol
programme.desc: Robert Elms and director David Mallet discuss Billy Idol. Topics include his music video contribution and influence during the early years of MTV. This episode features Idol's music videos from "White Wedding" and "Eyes Without a Face".

programme.title: The Big Interview: Rod Stewart
programme.desc: Rod Stewart is still rocking out fifty years into his career: he has a hit Las Vegas residency, continues to pack arenas around the world, and has a new album out. He's left his mark on rock & roll, and he talks to Dan Rather about his life and legacy.

programme.title: The Big Interview
programme.desc: The multi-talented artist talks about his music, his passion, acting and he shows off his extensive collection of sports memorabilia.

programme.title: Bob Marley: Roots of the Man
programme.desc: Robert Nesta Marley, known across the globe as Bob Marley, was the first and debatably only superstar ever to emerge from the third world.

programme.title: Final 24
programme.desc: Using archive footage, dramatic reenactment, and interviews with his closest companions, Final 24 details the last 24 hours of Jim Morrison’s life.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Fight or flight"
programme.desc: In the finale of season two, the team spend the night at a former RAF base. Bangs on request, footsteps, and more are encountered; and the venue has a strange effect on some of the team, with one AYH member getting the fright of their lives.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Something foreboding"
programme.desc: Sara, Phil and the Are You Haunted team head to South Yorkshire, where a venue with military connections awaits investigation. Based on personal experiences, will the team think this venue is haunted, or not; and will you agree with their decision?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Are you kidding me!?
programme.desc: A ghostly white lady, phantom footsteps, and more have been reported at this quirky haunted guest house. Fellow investigator Adam Morgan joins the team as they witness for themselves some of the reported phenomenon. Who will Sara put in charge tonight?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Can you not?"
programme.desc: Sara, Phil, and the rest of the AYH team head north, to Northumberland. Here they investigate a location that has for many years been the scene of supposed paranormal activity. And one of the team celebrates a landmark birthday. But who?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Total creep out!"
programme.desc: The Are You Haunted team is back this time with a rather unusual haunted venue, providing a very uneasy atmosphere. With reports of phantom footsteps, unexplained voices, and a full apparition. But what will the team uncover for themselves?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Something's in here
programme.desc: The Are You Haunted team head to the West Midlands to investigate a former chapel. Unexplained noises, footsteps, shadows, and things being moved have all been reported. But which member of the team will Sara choose to lead this investigation?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Hide and seek"
programme.desc: An old venue with a different past awaits the team in this episode, where among other reported incidents, the ghost of a mischievous little boy has been seen and heard, playing. Plus, voices and unexplained footsteps have been encountered.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Mark Green
programme.desc: Mark Green disappears one night without a trace. Police are stumped. There is no evidence. Diane Lazarus, a psychic in a nearby town, is holding a reading.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Southern Organs
programme.desc: A dedicated psychic puts his reputation on the line to track down two con men in Scotland.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Halloween Homicide
programme.desc: It’s Halloween night 2004, and two popular young women are brutally stabbed to death in their Napa Valley home.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Staunton Stalker
programme.desc: The college town of Staunton, Virginia is being terrorized by a stocking-masked, knife-wielding serial rapist.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: River Rat
programme.desc: An elderly widow is brutally murdered in her small town Louisiana home.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: A Taxing Death
programme.desc: After heading out for a routine day of appointments, Montana state auditor Walter Sullivan disappears. Nine days later, his body is found at the bottom of a cliff beside his mangled car.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Burning Betrayal
programme.desc: When 20-year-old Kim Antonakos disappears after a late night out in Manhattan, her father files a missing persons report.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Memphis Police have a prime suspect in the gruesome killings of two prostitutes. But as they prepare to make an arrest, psychic Carol Pate pays the cops a visit.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Lynsey Quy
programme.desc: Lynsey Quy a young mother and wife mysteriously vanishes on Christmas day, her husband reports her missing, the police start their search.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Vision of Murder
programme.desc: A quaint New Jersey town is rocked when a local nurse, Betty Cornish, is found bludgeoned to death in her apartment.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Darryl Cozart
programme.desc: Family man Darryl Cozart disappears one night after work. His wife is frantic she knows something is wrong. The police believe it’s a missing persons case.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: The Ladykillers
programme.desc: Rose Swartwood, an elderly woman living alone in a New York project, is stabbed to death late one night in a frenzied attack. For the next two years the case remains unsolved.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Jason Williams
programme.desc: Jason Williams goes out to meet friends for a night of drinking. He never returns. His family is frantic, it’s uncharacteristic of him to be out of touch.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: A Killer Among Us
programme.desc: In Thomaston Georgia, when local roofer Thomas Bragg is found murdered in his bed, the whole town is talking. The police suspect his wife, but they have no witnesses, no leads and no murder weapon.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: A Psychic for the Defense
programme.desc: Investigators are perplexed when a gagged and mutilated body washes up on a Florida beach. The FBI is called in to help crack the gruesome case.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Suddenly Psychic
programme.desc: When a 31-year-old nurse and single mother, Melanie Uribe, is carjacked in an L.A. suburb, police find her burned out truck the same night, but no trace of the victim.

programme.title: Psychic Investigators: Forced Entry
programme.desc: Stacy Hendrickson is a college student living in Tempe Arizona. Away from home for the first time, she vanishes one night from her apartment.

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: "Who's that?"
programme.desc: The team head to the East Midlands, to another overnight paranormal investigation. With reports of objects moving on their own, a cursed voodoo doll, and unexplained figures seen, will the team be able to shed any light on these mysterious incidents?

programme.title: Are You Haunted..?: Unfinished business
programme.desc: The Are You Haunted..? team are back with the first episode kicking of a brand new season. Three more venues are put before the team, only one will be investigated: but which one?

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A man arrives in North Fork, intending to marry Lou Mallory. The hotel owner looks for a way out from marrying the man to whom her dying father promised her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Manly Art
programme.desc: A boxing promoter comes to Dodge City challenging men to fight Champ Starbuck for money.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Sweet Revenge
programme.desc: The widow Mrs. Phillips sparks interest from Earp. At the same time, a convict Earp sent to prison escapes the chain gang and heads for Dodge City for revenge.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Imitation Jesse James
programme.desc: A bandit is striking stagecoaches near Dodge City. Based on his description Earp and Hal are sure it is the imitation Jesse James who has never been convicted.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Kansas Lily
programme.desc: Lily Reeve known as the Kansas Lily arrives in Dodge City. After pulling a gun while gambling, she is arrested by Earp while Bat thinks she is a nice innocent lady.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Wyatt Earp Rides Shotgun
programme.desc: Earp is asked by Wells Fargo to ride shotgun to help catch the Purvis gang. Earp agrees but a grandmother complicates the situation when she refuses to wait for a later stage.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Wyatt Fights
programme.desc: Earp is caught in the middle between two saloon owners who want to force the owners of the Long Branch Saloon out and take it over.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Ballad and Truth
programme.desc: Earp has to contend with the fallout and fights caused by the tall tales told by railroad engineer Tex McKay.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Schoolteacher
programme.desc: The stage arrives with the driver shot and $5000 of new silver dollar coins stolen. The driver gives Earp details about the robbery but they turn out to be false.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: When Sherman Marched Through Kansas
programme.desc: When word spreads through Dodge City that General Sherman would be making a stop there, havoc breaks out for Earp.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Big Brother Vigil
programme.desc: A divorced woman working the mayor's office and a childhood friend of the Earps, has Virgil Earp arriving to protect Wyatt from her.

programme.title: Bells of San Angelo
programme.desc: A silver mine with a secret entrance along the Mexican border is the setting for this typical Roy Rogers western with music.

programme.title: South of Heaven, West of Hell
programme.desc: A small-town marshal, tormented by the puzzling conditions that surround him, is forced to confront his demons at an unexpected and untraditional 'family reunion'.

programme.title: China 9, Liberty 37
programme.desc: A condemned man, Clayton, is released on the condition that he kills a rancher for the railway company. He can't do it, but when the man's wife believes she has killed him, she runs away with Clayton. The husband, not dead, follows them.

programme.title: Justice
programme.desc: Justice has a new name in this fearless, action-packed, high-stakes western. U.S. Marshal James McCord seeking justice for his brother's murder, defends a small town from a corrupt Mayor and his henchmen who are hell-bent on reviving the civil war.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: A Bargain Is for Keeping
programme.desc: Mary Ann finds a family heirloom in the possession of a pawn man, but he refuses to give it up for free.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Peter the Hunter
programme.desc: A bear hunter and his daughters nurse an injured Easterner back to health.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: Paid in Full
programme.desc: A former Confederate officer tries to help the family of a soldier killed in battle.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: A Bell for Volcano
programme.desc: A town drunk and a businessman make a trip to San Francisco to buy a bell for the new church in Volcano, CA.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The Trouble with Taxes
programme.desc: Jeb Slade talks his brother Billy into helping him rob Aaron Winters, who is wealthy from his borax findings.

programme.title: Death Valley Days: The Race at Cherry Creek
programme.desc: Two newspaper editors compete for the right to publish Denver's first newspaper.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Volcano Island (Gadget Goes Hawaiian)
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Inspector Gadget, Penny and Brain while on vacation on a tropical island battle with Dr. Claw's mechanical shark and a phony volcano.

programme.title: Inspector Gadget: Arabian Nights
programme.desc: Watch Inspector Gadget every weeknight at 7/6c on Pluto TV. Inspector Gadget battles in the deserts of Yetzanistand to stop M.A.D. agent, Fast Adbul, from stealing the sacred scimitar from Prince Abar.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Cruel Intentions
programme.desc: Christen thinks she's met her college sweetheart but she breaks things off when he reveals his cruel nature. When John's dark past is publically exposed, John stops at nothing to get revenge.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Hopelessly Devoted
programme.desc: When Kaia Anderson is kind to fellow student Robert, she never imagined it will lead to a lifelong obsession that won't be stopped by reason or the law.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Kiss of Death
programme.desc: When kickboxing champion Lee Redmond helps a woman in need, he finds himself the object of what could soon become a fatal attraction.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Love is a Battlefield
programme.desc: A young nurse falls in love and marries the man of her dreams. But before long, her husband becomes violent and controlling.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Haunting Obsession
programme.desc: Tracy is in the 8th grade when she offers to tutor an outcast. Little does she know, this simple act of kindness will become a never-ending nightmare.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Gamble with Death
programme.desc: After Donna Eskew calls off her romance with Glen, he corners Donna in a casino parking lot with a chilling threat. She'll have to use all her wits to stay alive.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: 13-year-old Jessie Cooper thinks Nick Hamilton is just a nice neighbor. Little does she know he's a sex offender with a penchant for adolescent girls.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Bogeyman
programme.desc: Sherry Meinberg is living the innocent life of a teen in the 1950s when she meets handsome Chuck Gray. But the man of her dreams soon turns into a monster.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Predator By Proxy
programme.desc: After Angell kicks her ex-husband Michael out of the house, he returns for revenge. Michael creates fake advertisements that send strange men right to Angell's door.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Badlands
programme.desc: Marie DePalma, a shy middle school student in Detroit, is thrilled when an older student takes an interest in her. As their relationship develops, her life turns into a living hell.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Campaign of Terror
programme.desc: Bob Krueger is devastated to lose a race for the Senate. But nothing could protect his family from the obsession of a former staffer who now threatens to destroy them.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Stalked.com
programme.desc: After meeting online, Patrick begins to stalk Kristen across the web. Kristen begins to realize that nothing will stop her cyberstalker from tracking her down with deadly intentions.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: The Ties that Blind
programme.desc: Kathy is thrilled when her husband David treats her well, as he often beats her down with insults and abuse. When Kathy tries to escape her marriage, David is not about to let her go.

programme.title: Stalked: Someone's Watching: Power Play
programme.desc: Jane Haag rarely has time to date until she falls in love with Ron. But Jane discovers that Ron is a virtual time bomb about to explode.

programme.title: The Case: The Roissy Bagger (Amaury de Hauteclocque)
programme.desc: While directing the anti-terrorist unit at 36 Quai des Orfèvres, Commissioner De Hauteclocque finds himself faced with a case that is making headlines.

programme.title: The Case: Murder at the Boarding School
programme.desc: In November 2011 Agnès Marin, 13, vanishes from her boarding school in the Cévennes.

programme.title: The Case: Masterpieces in Peril (Thomas Ethardy)
programme.desc: As the head of the Art Theft Unit, Major Erhardy is confronted with an incredible case: the theft of five master paintings.

programme.title: The Case: The Stone Cutter (Daniel Roussette)
programme.desc: It all began with the discovery of the body of an old lady in the forest at Pacy-sur-Eure by hunters.

programme.title: The Case: The Strangler of Strasbourg (Philip Hittinger)
programme.desc: In 2012, when Commander Philippe Hittinger was entrusted with one of the oldest “cold cases” in France, he could not imagine the outcome.

programme.title: The Case: Deadly Rumour
programme.desc: It isn't his first crime scene, yet six years later it will continue to haunt him.

programme.title: The Case: The Bloody Cave (Boris Verièrres)
programme.desc: Patrick Isoird was found on July 17, 2014 in a cave near Sète, bound hand and foot, his body burned. Commander Boris Verrières investigated what looks like a "crime of self-esteem".

programme.title: The Case: The Treiber Affair
programme.desc: In 2004, a female couple disappears.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: Lethal Investment
programme.desc: April 1999 in the Port of Quebec City, the "Spirit of Columbus" is moored at Pier 29. A worker sees a body floating at the base of the platform. The pathologist determines that the woman had been strangled. The case is becomes a murder.

programme.title: Dark Waters of Crime: The Bathtub Sisters
programme.desc: The mother of two teenaged girls is found dead in her bathtub. The coroner declares it an accidental death, but a year later, new information prompt the police to reopen the case.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Earthquakes
programme.desc: Deadly, highly destructive and impossible to predict the Earthquake is perhaps one of Mother Nature's most terrifying forces. They flatten entire cities, create mass homelessness, and take thousands of lives. Earthquakes are truly deadly disasters.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Tsunamis
programme.desc: In Japanese, Tsunami translates to “harbour wave.” They are unleashed when a major disturbance occurs underwater, creating a series of enormous, deadly swells.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Drought
programme.desc: Most parts of the world are liable to the horrors brought by lack of water. In the United States only hurricanes bring about more economic hardships. It is not only a lack of rain and high temperatures that causes drought.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Cyclones
programme.desc: An intense area of low pressure that forms over warm tropical waters, tropical cyclones are responsible for some of the most catastrophic extreme weather events. Their deadly winds and torrential rain wreak destruction on an unprecedented scale.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Hurricane
programme.desc: Linking up with legendary storm chaser Jim Leonard, George flies to Jamaica to track Hurricane Dean. George then travels to Nova Scotia to experience the even bigger turmoil of Hurricane Noel at the iconic Maritime village of Peggy's Cove.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Java: Land of Fire
programme.desc: In the Pacific Ring of Fire island of Java, George explores new ash eruptions from Anak Krakatau, whose 1883 eruption shook the world. He travels to Merapi and descends into Kawah Ijen to explore the world's largest lake of sulfuric acid.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Under Pressure
programme.desc: After submarine exploration of Grand Cayman Island, George dives with Canadian Armed Forces' experimental deep pressure unit. With explorers Chris Harvey-Clark and Phil Nuytten he investigates newly discovered "Black Smoker" deep sea vents.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Costa Rica
programme.desc: George explores the volcanoes of Costa Rica with an international team of scientists, rafts down white water rivers in full flood, rappels down raging waterfalls, and handles some of deadliest snakes this tropical country has to offer.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Empty Quarter
programme.desc: The Empty Quarter is a windswept area of sand dunes. In a tiny corner of this vast desert lies Dubai, a glitzy ultra-modern playground. George heads out from Abu Dhabi on a 4W safari to see both sides of this corner of Arabia.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Eco-Disasters
programme.desc: Uzbekistan's Aral Sea, once one of the largest freshwater lakes in the world, shrunk to 1/6 its previous size; a Crimea mountain carved into a submarine base; Chernobyl nuclear site reduced to a radioactive wasteland.

programme.title: Angry Planet: West Coast Winter Weather
programme.desc: On Canada's rugged West Coast, George ice-climbs a frozen waterfall, uses ski-skins to climb Mt.Garibaldi to an alpine lake, visits a storm-watching lodge on British Columbia's Long Beach, home of winter surfing and massive Pacific storms.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Waterspouts
programme.desc: In the Florida Keys, George uses a motorboat, a van and small plane to get up close to waterspouts - the nautical cousins of tornadoes. He also meets some of the 25 million alligators that live in the Sunshine State.

programme.title: Angry Planet: Highway to Hail
programme.desc: George and his team head into "bears' cage", looking to get beat up by the biggest, baddest hailstones in Texas and Oklahoma. Their storm chasing vehicles don't look too pretty after coming through these massive storms.

programme.title: Naked Science: The Big Bang - The First Three Seconds
programme.desc: 13.7 billion years ago there was absolutely nothing. No space, no time, and no matter. Naked Science follows the first three seconds of creation when a speck of light appeared from nothing and rapidly expanded into an enormous Universe.
programme.sub-title: The Big Bang - The First Three Seconds

programme.title: Naked Science: Snowball Earth
programme.desc: There is a theory that scientists once dismissed as absurd - that long ago the Earth became so cold every inch of it was entombed in ice.

programme.title: Naked Science: Super Flares - Could They Cause Mass Extinction?
programme.desc: Superflares are amongst the greatest events of the Universe. These magnetic explosions can release energy millions of times greater than atomic bombs. They produce streams of highly energetic particles which can be highly destructive to life.
programme.sub-title: Super Flares - Could They Cause Mass Extinction?

programme.title: Naked Science: Diamonds
programme.desc: Naked Science follows the story of a diamond from the creation of carbon inside the heart of a dying sun, through to the cutting of a diamond mine in South Africa.

programme.title: Naked Science: Magnetic Earth
programme.desc: The Earth hurtles through space protected by an invisible force field, known as a magnetosphere.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: El Niño
programme.desc: It is estimated that between 1997 and 1998, “El Niño” took the lives of 24,000 people and created a startling $34 billion (US) in economic damages worldwide. In this episode we explain what “El Niño” is.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Tornadoes
programme.desc: The Tornado is one of Mother Nature’s most extraordinary phenomena. These intense, rapidly rotating columns of air can attain wind speeds of more than 480 kilometres per hour, and have been witnessed on every continent except Antarctica.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Avalanches
programme.desc: We tend to think of disasters as inevitable - but often Mother Nature gives us vital clues which we foolishly ignore or overlook. This episode will take a close look at avalanches and what we can learn about how, where, and why they strike.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters: Mosquitoes
programme.desc: In 2014, Microsoft Founder Bill Gates described the mosquito as the “deadliest animal in the world.” It is estimated by the World Health Organisation that they kill roughly 750,000 people per year.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Cuda 'Tat
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Taking Home the Bronze
programme.desc: See the beautiful Turbine-Bonze Metallic 1968 Charger meticulously resurrected and revealed to its proud owner.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Judgement Day
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Mission Commission
programme.desc: After chasing it for an entire year, Charles finally finds and buys the classy 1962 Chrysler 300 he's been dreaming of. He and his team now face the challenge of having only ten days to give it the period correct customization.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Crescent City Cuda
programme.desc: The guys are asked by famed car collector, Tim Wellborne, to create the "most beautiful car that never was"-- the 1970 Paint Chip 'Cuda to feature in his musclecar museum.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Voodoo Demon
programme.desc: Charles and Trey happen across a rare 1972 Dodge Demon driving through the streets of New Orleans. After snagging it for $2,500 they have just one week to transform it into the ultimate 1970's street machine.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: The Wild One
programme.desc: Charles and Trey head to a farm just outside of town to purchased their latest project--a run down 1967 Ford Mustang. After discovering its rarity, they must decide whether to take it back to stock or soup it up.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Mystery Trike
programme.desc: Charles and Trey get a lead on a possible Ed Roth Trike, a three-wheeled monster that is motorcycle in the front and car in the back. While Trey is hesitant about the authenticity of purchase due to lack of documentation, Charles trusts his gut.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: The Franken-Fury
programme.desc: After a local lawyer informs Charles and Trey of an estate sale, they race over to find a rare 1968 Plymouth Fury 3. Because the Fury was seen simply as a conventional 60's family vehicle, it was overlooked by many vintage car collectors.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Heavy Chevy
programme.desc: Charles and Trey are hired to fix local legend and rock star Pepper Keenan's 1955 Chevrolet. In an effort to build business, they take on the challenge of rebuilding the engine to crank out 400+ horsepower for only $17,000.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Po' Boy Pantera
programme.desc: The Bomb Factory has an opportunity to buy an extremely rare exotic muscle car. Since the asking price is too much, they go in on the car with a financial backer.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Camaro Cash-In
programme.desc: Charles and Trey stumble across a 1970 Z28 Chevrolet Camaro deep in the bayou in major need of restoration. If Charles can authenticate and fix this once sought after machine, he could be looking at a lot of money.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Charged Up
programme.desc: Trey and Frankie get a call about a 1974 Dodge Charger down at the used car lot. It's in pretty good shape, but with another auction only a few weeks away, the Bomb Factory will need to soup up this muscle car in record time.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Bet on the 'Vette
programme.desc: In an eerie abandoned warehouse, Charles discovers more than just ghosts--hidden in a damp corner, under a sheet, he finds a sleek, 1959 Chevrolet Corvette.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: The Ballad of El Camino
programme.desc: After haggling down to a pretty reasonable price, Trey and Charles fight to bring a trashed up collectors dream back to life--a 1968 Chevy El Camino. On top of already being ridden with rust, the team must also find a way to turn a profit.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Big Easy Bandit
programme.desc: Charles and Trey find their new project in a Pontiac Firebird Trans Am in their pal's junkyard. After further research Charles finds out it's a rare Trans Am referred to as the "Bandit Edition".

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Bayou Bronco
programme.desc: Charles and Trey get a call from a man deep in the Bayou looking to unload his 1971 Ford Bronco. The duo hope to revamp this pony in time for a classic car auction a few weeks away. Since Broncos aren't the typical car featured at a classic car auction.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Get My Goat
programme.desc: With the business of the Bomb Factory growing, the team is hired by a man who is looking to create the car of his childhood dreams--a 1967 Pontiac GTO capable of going 0-60 mph in under 5 seconds.

programme.title: Big Easy Motors: Maverick Mojo
programme.desc: When Charles and Trey snag a 1970 Ford Maverick Grabber along with a parts car, they're bringing in something a little more personal.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Priviledge To Drive a '68 GTX Convertible
programme.desc: A new season of Graveyard Carz, the show wherein abandoned and left­for­death classic Mopars are given a new lease on life.
programme.sub-title: Priviledge To Drive a '68 GTX Convertible

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Daytona vs. Hellcat
programme.desc: The world is littered with the remains of forgotten muscle cars. At Graveyard Carz, some will get a second chance in the hands of Mark Worman and the Ghouls.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Another Dreamz Machine
programme.desc: Mark and Justin begin assembly on the ultra rare 1971 Mr. Norm's Dodge Demon. Then the team shifts gears to focus on a Graveyard Dreamz 1969 Charger tribute car that's made to order.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Amentini Shaken Not Stirred
programme.desc: The 1970 Challenger in B7 Blue owned by the Amentinis is finished and ready to be revealed. See every moment of its restoration from dead to resurrected and detailed to the way it left the factory floor. This is what Graveyard Carz lives for.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Jonesing for a Road Runner
programme.desc: When high profile local car dealer Don Jones Jr. wants to bring back the car of his youth where does he go? Anywhere he wants! But when your high school dream car is a 1969 Road Runner your dream shop is Graveyard Carz.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: A-Body in the Graveyard
programme.desc: Rarely seen among Mopar muscle the Chrysler A-Bodies have some die-hard fans!

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Baptism by Fire
programme.desc: The Pheonix 'Cuda the car that survived a deadly explosion is ready for its purification. Its rust and metal are seared away to expose its hidden sins. Thus begins the first stage of its monumental rebirth.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz: Rallye the Troops
programme.desc: Mark leaves Will in charge of the shop while working on his super-secret SEMA 2019 build. This leaves George and Dougie to begin the final assembly to the 1970 B7 Challenger. In the body shop a 1970 'Cuda is prepped for its first-coat of Rallye Red.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly Needs A Maw
programme.desc: Jed visits the bank to tell Drysdale that he plans to go back home to look for a wife. When Mrs. Fenwick visits, Drysdale decides that she would be perfect.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Get Culture
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to get a taste of culture to fit in the high-class society of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: A Man For Elly
programme.desc: Granny loves one TV Western star, Quirt Manly, and Granny already has him set up for Elly May, because she knows he is probably the only who can tame the vine-swinging girl.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Giant Jackrabbit
programme.desc: A kangaroo invades the world of the Clampetts, but Granny thinks it’s a big rabbit.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Girl From Home
programme.desc: An old beau shows up to marry Jethro for his money.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Lafe Lingers On
programme.desc: Lafe Crick returns to the Clampett mansion looking to get rich off of Jed's money. He tries to get a job at the bank guarding Jed's money, only to get a few million of it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Race For Queen
programme.desc: Bob Cummings plays himself and must judge a beauty contest.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Strike Oil
programme.desc: In the first episode Jed Clampett strikes oil, sells his land and moves to a 35 room mansion in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Getting Settled
programme.desc: When they arrive at their new mansion they are mistaken for backwoods servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Meanwhile, Back At The Cabin
programme.desc: The Clampetts find that the comforts of the mansion do not always compare with the comforts of their shack back home.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Clampetts Meet Mrs Drysdale
programme.desc: When Mr. Drysdale describes Mrs. Drysdale as being a hypochondriac, the Clampetts assume she must be a drunk.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Buys Stock
programme.desc: When Drysdale suggest buying good stock, Jed quickly buys some cows, pigs and chickens. Meanwhile, Granny has plans to sober up Mrs. Drysdale, who the family believes is a lush.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Trick Or Treat
programme.desc: The Clampetts are feeling homesick so they decide to go visit their new neighbours. Little do they know, it is Halloween, a holiday they have never heard of.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Servants
programme.desc: Drysdale attempts another step insocial renovation of the Clampetts by lending them his servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jethro Goes To School
programme.desc: A private school teacher is shocked to learn that her new fifth grade student is Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly's First Date
programme.desc: Elly May is set up with Sonny Drysdale. When they meet, the date ends very soon, after Sonny tries to kiss Elly’s hand, but she thinks he is trying to bite her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Pygmalion And Elly
programme.desc: Sonny Drysdale plays Pygmalion and Julius Caesar as he resumes his courtship of Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly Races Jethrine
programme.desc: Will Sonny propose to Elly? Can Pearl marry her daughter off? Utter confusion ensues.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Great Feud
programme.desc: Sonny jilts Elly and the Clampetts load their shootin’ irons for a match with the Drysdales.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Home For Christmas
programme.desc: When Granny, Uncle Jed, Elly May and Jethro decide to return to the country for the holidays, they discover airline travel.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Home for Christmas, the Clampetts help Pearl woo Mr. Brewster, a big oil company executive.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Rescues Pearl
programme.desc: Pearl attempts to snag Mr. Brewster until he makes a ridiculous public announcement.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Back To Californy
programme.desc: Jed is confronted with too many cooks when he invites Pearl and Jethrine to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed's Dilemma
programme.desc: Jed takes the family on a sight seeing tour of Beverly Hills to cool a feud between Granny and Pearl.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Saves Drysdale's Marriage
programme.desc: Drysdale’s marriage is threatened when he gets a new housekeeper while his wife is away.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Elly's Animals
programme.desc: Police and Elly’s animals converge on the Clampett estate when Pearl starts giving yodeling lessons.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Throws A Wing Ding
programme.desc: Two of Pearl’s ardent suitors come to visit her in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Plays Solomon
programme.desc: Granny’s plan to stop Pearl’s yodeling backfires when the police come and find her still.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Duke Steals A Wife
programme.desc: Duke, Jed’s bloodhound, becomes matchmaker for his master and Mlle. Denise, a glamorous Frenchwoman.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Buys The Freeway
programme.desc: A confidence man tries to sell Jed the Hollywood Bowl and a Freeway.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: Jed Becomes A Banker
programme.desc: Jed is made a bank vice president so he can compete in an interbank skeet shoot.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies: The Family Tree
programme.desc: An expert on American history finds evidence that Jed’s family preceded the Mayflower to America.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 2: Moons
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 5: Space Missions
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 3: Asteroids
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 6: Fermi paradox
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: Inside Outer Space: Episode 7: The Milky Way
programme.desc: Come with us as we explore and unravel the mysteries of what lies beyond our planet Earth. This is a series packed with space stories and information about our universe covering what we can see.

programme.title: The New Frontier: The Planet Makers
programme.desc: From the beginnings of our Solar System four and half billion years ago there remains tantalizing clues to its evolution; remnent debris: asteroids and comets.

programme.title: The New Frontier: OCEANS IN THE SKY
programme.desc: Juice and the Europa Clipper are two missions to our Solar System’s largest planet.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Return To The Moon
programme.desc: The Moon, our closest celestial companion. Our indispensible dance partner through the cosmos.

programme.title: The New Frontier: THE NEXT BIG LEAPS
programme.desc: Projects in the works. SunRISE, SPHEREx, NEOS and others, their mission to expand our knowledge of Earth, the surrounding space, Dark Matter, and the earliest galaxies. N

programme.title: RISING TIDES
programme.desc: The next generation of Earth observation satellites are now in place maintaining the continuity of long-term climate data, in particular the planets rising temperatures and related ocean levels.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Orbit
programme.desc: The International Space Station is undoubtedly the jewel in the crown of low Earth orbit; observation post, research lab and class room.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Getting There
programme.desc: Launching payloads into space is a very difficult task, historically rocket launches are the proverbial 'swords into ploughshares'.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Slingshot
programme.desc: Sending probes throughout the solar system is a mathematicians dream and an engineers nightmare, sling shotting probes around other planets to arrive at their destination.

programme.title: The New Frontier: Atmosphere
programme.desc: How do astronauts cope with living in space?

programme.title: The New Frontier: GIANTS IN THE DARK
programme.desc: Asteroids, the debris from the early solar system hold tantalizing clues to planetary formation. The spacecraft Psyche readies to study a unique metallic asteroid.

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini: Docking and EVA - In the final phase of the Gemini program NASA struggles with docking and spacewalks. Curiosity Roving Mars - On the surface of Mars the Curiosity rover is changing the way we think about the red planet.
programme.sub-title: Project Gemini Docking, Mars Curiousity & Satellite Swarms

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini Commences - Did Gemini give the US a lead in the space race? Venus Express - The last days of ESA's Venus probe. EMU - NASA's Extravehicular Mobility Unit. Deep Space Communications - ESA's worldwide network of giant dishes.
programme.sub-title: Project Gemini, Venus Express, EMU & Deep Space Communication

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Mercury Begins - The start of NASA & America's first manned space program. Mars Express - The European Space Agency's Mars Satellite. The Soyuz Launch System - The gradual evolution of Russia's Soyuz launcher.
programme.sub-title: Project Mercury, The Mars Express & The Soyuz Launch System

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Apollo Program Begins - At the very beginning of NASA's moon project things go wrong. Caves - ESA's special training program for astronauts. Planck - Mapping the cosmic microwave background radiation.
programme.sub-title: The Apollo Program Begins, Caves & Planck

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Cold War & The Start of the Space Race - Cold War rivalry and the acceleration of space exploration. Servicing Hubble - Preparations for Hubble's final servicing mission. Chasing a Comet - Launch and the difficult path to rendezvous.
programme.sub-title: The Space Race, The Hubble, Chasing Comets & Space Debris

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Mercury Advances - America's first manned space program finally puts a man in orbit. Camera Tracking - The array of special cameras that follow a spacecraft at launch. The International Space Station - The building and operation.
programme.sub-title: Project Mercury Advancement, Camera Tracking & The International Space Station

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Shuttle Program - The first re-useable spacecraft. The Challenger Disaster - Pressing launch schedules lead to carelessness and the loss of the Challenger. Return to Space - A re-designed shuttle is back in space with a redefined role.
programme.sub-title: The Shuttle Program, The Challenger Disaster & Return to Space

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Beyond Earth Orbit - The Apollo program takes bold new steps. IXV Re-entry Vehicle - Europe is working to perfect a re-entry vehicle. Galileo Satellites Lost and Found - Navigation satellites go into incorrect orbit.
programme.sub-title: Beyond Earth Orbit, IXV Vehicles & Galileo Satellites Lost and Found

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Project Gemini Advances - NASA refines the techniques needed for rendezvous. Cassini at Saturn - In the Cassini probe's final years of activity, its handlers are asking it to do more complex and risky assignments.
programme.sub-title: Project Gemini Advances, Cassini at Saturn & More About Mars

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Space Shuttle Matures - The Space Transportation System changes the nature of orbital missions. Complex Construction in Space - Confidence in the shuttle begins to return and engineers for get the lessons of the past.
programme.sub-title: The Space Shuttle Matures, Complex Space Construction & The Final Years of the Space Shuttle

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: Rebuilding Project Apollo - After the Apollo 1 disaster NASA resumes manned space flight. Orbiting Carbon Observatory 2 - Monitoring the Earth's Co2 levels in unprecedented detail. Zero Gravity Training - Parabolic flights.
programme.sub-title: Rebuilding Apollo, Orbiting Carbon & Zero Gravity Training

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: The Beginning of the End - After the first Moon landing the Apollo science program was about to start in earnest but people were losing interest. Apollo Gets Complicated - New technology is added that extends the reach of the Apollo program.
programme.sub-title: The Beginning of the End, Apollo Gets Complicated & The End of Apollo

programme.title: Trajectory - Milestones in Space Exploration
programme.desc: To the Moon - The Apollo program achieves its major objective. Dragon, Falcon and Spacex - New directions in re-usable spacecraft. Gaia- Mapping our galaxy in unprecedented detail.
programme.sub-title: To The Moon, SpaceX's Dragon and Falcon & GAIA

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: Quantum Leap
programme.desc: Join Brian Greene on a wild ride into the weird realm of quantum physics, which governs the universe on the tiniest of scales.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: Universe or Multiverse?
programme.desc: Cutting-edge theories are suggesting that our universe may not be the only universe. Instead, it may be just one of an infinite number of worlds that make up the multiverse.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: What Is Space?
programme.desc: Brian Greene reveals space as a dynamic fabric that can stretch, twist, warp, and ripple under the influence of gravity, and explores dark energy, which makes up 70% of the universe.

programme.title: The Fabric of the Cosmos: The Illusion of Time
programme.desc: Brian Greene takes us on the ultimate time traveling adventure, hurtling 50 years into the future before stepping into a wormhole to travel back to Big Bang.

programme.title: Abduction
programme.desc: When Nathan (Taylor Lautner) discovers the parents who raised him aren't his real folks, he begins to uncover unsettling secrets that trigger events and leave him running for his life.

programme.title: The Big Fight
programme.desc: Tien Peng and Cheung Ching-ching play the leaders of a rebel group of Chinese kung fu fighters in a Japanese occupied town at the height of the war.

programme.title: The Cannonball Run
programme.desc: The classic comedy with cool stars and even cooler cars! Based on a true race event, Burt Reynolds leads an all-star cast in the ultimate quest to win The Cannonball Run.

programme.title: The Librarian: Quest for the Spear
programme.desc: As a means of finding the legendary book known as the Key of Solomon, Flynn pairs with a brainy archaeologist to first acquire the map legend. Unfortunately, they must elude the sinister General Samir and the ulterior plans of Flynn's uncle.

programme.title: We Die Young
programme.desc: Sudden Death meets Sicario in this gritty thriller starring action legend Jean Claud Van Damme. When a ruthless drug lord recruits a 10-year-old boy, his older brother is desperate to keep him safe and flees for their lives.

programme.title: The Good, The Bad and The Dead
programme.desc: A man wakes up in the desert wounded, with no memory and four million in cash. Pursued by a notorious drug lord (Danny Trejo), a DEA Agent (Dolph Lundgren), and a corrupt Sheriff (Michael Pare) who will stop at nothing to get his hand on the fortune.

programme.title: King Arthur: Excalibur Rising
programme.desc: The story of King Arth-yr Ddantgwyn comes to an end in the 520AD, in the battle of Camlann. In the heat of battle, Arth-yr, with the legendary Excalibur, lands a fatal blow to his son Mordred, before receiving a deadly wound himself.

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang in the UK traffics Eastern Europeans and then enslaves them. The women forced into sex, the men into illegal fights. When they cross a local businessman, a war escalates.

programme.title: Redline
programme.desc: Starring Eddie Griffin and Nathan Phillips. With the speedometer maxed out, a group of exotic car fanatics hit the streets in hopes of winning a life-changing sum of 24 million dollars. Every rule is broken as these drivers.

programme.title: Bolo
programme.desc: Two convicts get freed from prison and become lawmen in a corrupt village.

programme.title: Felicia's Journey
programme.desc: A young woman leaves Ireland to find her boyfriend in England, and while there is helped by a man hiding unsettling secrets.

programme.title: Clover Bend
programme.desc: An LA cop whose wife is killed in a shootout moves back to his hometown, trying to rebuild a life for himself and his children. Unbeknownst to him, his wife's killers are seeking revenge for one of their own who was also killed in the shootout.

programme.title: Seduced By A Thief
programme.desc: When a security guard is blamed for the theft of a necklace, he tracks down the beautiful thief, only to be seduced into a world of diamond smuggling and double-cross.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: After attempting to murder a woman he's convinced tried to kill him in a past life, a man is committed to a hospital for the criminally insane, but a suspicious District Attorney is convinced that the man has killed before.
programme.sub-title: Mary Higgins Clark: Haven't We Met Before

programme.title: The Forger
programme.desc: A thief (John Travolta) works with his father (Christopher Plummer) and son to forge a painting by Monet and steal the original. Together, they plan the heist of their lives!

programme.title: Assassin
programme.desc: Danny Dyer (Eastenders) is back on top form in Assassin, a brutal, hard-hitting story of Jamie, a former hitman out for revenge.

programme.title: Insomnia
programme.desc: Academy Award winners Robin Williams, Al Pacino and Hilary Swank star in a thriller set in the land of the midnight sun, where the mind of even a tough cop can be threatened by Insomnia.

programme.title: Accident
programme.desc: When a foursome steal a car for one night of fun, what starts as a wild joy ride turns into a terrifying nightmare. After a violent crash, they discover that being stuck at the bottom of a ravine is the least of their problems.

programme.title: Deadly Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Identical twin sisters Janna and Callie are fierce rivals. Janna has the perfect job, and beautiful daughter, Fiona. Callie drifts from job to job and has stepped over the line with the law on her most recent one as a nurse.

programme.title: Desperate Escape
programme.desc: Brooke Harris is attacked by an unknown assailant and is hospitalized. A man named Brett shows up at the hospital and says that he is her husband, and the doctors explain to him that Brooke has lost her memory and it could take a while for her to recover.

programme.title: Magical Adventures in the Forbidden City
programme.desc: In another world Abigail lives in a city whose borders were closed years ago because of a disease. She takes us on a magical adventure, rising against the forces in command and shows how being brave and following your heart can show anything is possible.

programme.title: Frank Herbert's Dune: Episode 2
programme.desc: The Lady Jessica and her son, Paul Atreides, manage to contact the native Dune population, known as Fremen.

programme.title: Target Earth
programme.desc: When aliens have infiltrated society by inhabiting bodies of select human beings, they plan a full-scale invasion of Earth. A detective finds the information that can stop the attack; however the information is in the mind of a six-year-old child.

programme.title: Atlas Shrugged: Who Is John Galt?
programme.desc: Approaching collapse, the nation's economy is quickly eroding. As crime and fear take over the countryside, the government continues to exert its brutal force against the nation's most productive who are mysteriously vanishing.

programme.title: Alien Code: Alien Code
programme.desc: After deciphering a message found in a satellite, brilliant cryptographer Alex Jacobs finds himself being stalked by government agents and otherworldly beings.

programme.title: LX 2048
programme.desc: In the near future, the sun has become so toxic people can no longer leave their houses in daytime, and normal life is conducted mostly inside the virtual realm.

programme.title: Above the Shadows
programme.desc: Starring Olivia Thirlby, Alan Ritchson, Jim Gaffigan, Maria Dizzia, Tito Ortiz, David Johansen, and Megan Fox following an invisible woman who must find her way back with the help of the one man who can see her.

programme.title: Dark Encounter
programme.desc: This eerie supernatural thriller will get under your skin. After the mysterious disappearance of their daughter, grieving Olivia (Laura Fraser: Breaking Bad) and Ray (Mel Raido: Legend) notice strange lights near their home.

programme.title: Left Behind
programme.desc: A small group of survivors are left behind after millions of people suddenly vanish and the world is plunged into chaos and destruction.

programme.title: Signs of Evil - The Runes of the SS
programme.desc: The symbol of the SS stands for terror and the murder of millions. Documentary about the history of a symbol that represents murder.

programme.title: Hitler's People: Conformity
programme.desc: Nazi Germany 10 years before the 1944 assassination attempt: it’s the era just after the seizure of power, when enforced conformity becomes part of all aspects of life.

programme.title: Hitler's People: Total War
programme.desc: By the time of the Allied landings in Normandy, everything has changed: it marks the beginning of the end for Nazi Germany.

programme.title: Project Nazi: Designed for Power
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler’s mastery of propaganda, and his instinctive skill for effective design, helps win huge popular support for the Nazi party, a vital step in its march towards total power.

programme.title: Project Nazi: Hitler's Highways
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler promises to make Germany great again with his ambitious plans to create 22,000 kms of motorway and build one and half million “People’s Cars” every year.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany’s military strength after its humiliating defeat in the First World War by stealing raw materials from abroad.

programme.title: Project Nazi: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes control of all forms of media to spread Nazi propaganda.

programme.title: Project Nazi: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler’s bid for power depends on his most loyal and violent supporters, the SS. They use intimidation, detention, terror and even murder to defeat all the Nazis political enemies.

programme.title: Project Nazi: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Hitler uses technology and terror to keep Germans fighting to the bitter end.

programme.title: The Spying Game: Tales of the Cold War
programme.desc: During the Cold War, Germany becomes the battleground for countless spies.

programme.title: The Spying Game: Mission Behind the Iron Curtain
programme.desc: During the Cold War, tensions between East and West mount alarmingly.

programme.title: The Spying Game: War in the Shadows
programme.desc: The KGB exploits betrayal in US counterintelligence.

programme.title: Hostages of the SS: A Journey into the Unknown
programme.desc: The SS clandestinely transports their valuable hostages through the Alps.

programme.title: Hostages of the SS: On a Razor's Edge
programme.desc: In Niederdorf the hostages turn the tables on their kidnappers.

programme.title: Signs of Evil - The Runes of the SS
programme.desc: The symbol of the SS stands for terror and the murder of millions. Documentary about the history of a symbol that represents murder.

programme.title: Hitler's People: Conformity
programme.desc: Nazi Germany 10 years before the 1944 assassination attempt: it’s the era just after the seizure of power, when enforced conformity becomes part of all aspects of life.

programme.title: Hitler's People: Total War
programme.desc: By the time of the Allied landings in Normandy, everything has changed: it marks the beginning of the end for Nazi Germany.

programme.title: The Maury Show: You're a Gold Digger…My Man is Not Your Baby's Father!

programme.sub-title: 3 Men Tested…Which One Is My Baby's Father?

programme.desc: Gail needs more excitement in her life so she's been sleeping with her boyfriend's best friend! Next, Dave finds out that his girlfriend of three years is having an affair. He says he's willing to do anything to get her back, even wear her bra!

programme.desc: Jamie has been cheating on her boyfriend with a woman! Then, Steve believes his wife’s been cheating with another man. Next, LaToya's here to cause a family feud. She's been cheating with her girlfriend's sister!

programme.desc: Nicole wants her boyfriend back but only if he'll end his threesome. Next, Mesha's been in love with her husband's best friend, Jamie, for four years, but she won't take "No" for an answer.

programme.desc: Greg will reveal to his girlfriend, Deidra, that he secretly works as a gay, male escort. Madrina's boyfriend keeps cheating on her with his ex. Then, Ro-Ro has two girlfriends and today they'll force her to choose between them.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Freaky Sex Stories
programme.desc: Gail needs more excitement in her life so she's been sleeping with her boyfriend's best friend! Next, Dave finds out that his girlfriend of three years is having an affair. He says he's willing to do anything to get her back, even wear her bra!

programme.title: The Maury Show
programme.desc: Maury says “You ARE the father!” But are those the words the nervous, alleged fathers want to hear? Or will “You are NOT the father” send the moms into shock? Find out the results on today’s MAURY!
programme.sub-title: I'm Only 16…Am I Her Baby's Dad?

programme.sub-title: I Slept With 4 Men… Who's The Father?

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Pray My Ex Is Not My Baby's Dad!
